intent: Write a deep buying guide on 'streaming microphone and audio setup' for first-time content creators under $180. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the electronics and office-products categories and collect at least 4 relevant products (USB microphone, boom arm, pop filter, monitor headphones). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/technology AND /f/headphones for posts on beginner streaming mic choices or feedback/room treatment basics. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) present the 4 storefront picks with stats, (b) rank them by price-value, (c) inject community guidance on room treatment tricks before spending on gear, (d) close with a $180 package. Cite every claim.
